expectations.evidence: File is named anthropic-com-full-audit.md — does not match the naming convention.

expectations.text: Report contains all 5 category sections: AEO, GEO, SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, Structured Data
expectations.evidence: No explicit AEO or GEO categories. Report is organised as Critical Issues / Warnings / Notes rather than the 5-category framework.

expectations.text: Report contains an AI Crawler Policy section with training/retrieval bot analysis and a strategy grade
Report includes indexability checks (noindex, soft 404, canonical)
expectations.evidence: Canonical tag absence mentioned but not as structured indexability checks. No noindex or soft 404 checks.

expectations.text: Report shows multiple pages were crawled (not just the homepage) — at least 3 distinct URLs
Scores and grades are present for each category and overall, following the A+/A/B+/B/C+/C/D/F scale
expectations.evidence: No scoring system. Uses issue counts and severity labels but no numerical scores or letter grades.

expectations.text: Check results include specific evidence (actual values found, not just PASS/FAIL)
expectations.evidence: Good detail: 'og:type="website" instead of "article"', '302 instead of 301', 'HSTS max-age is only 1 hour', '9 H1 tags on claude-code'.

expectations.text: Report ends with a priority fix list ordered by severity
expectations.evidence: Has a 'top 4 critical issues' list but no structured priority fix list with severity ordering.
